headline: 'ESG Ratings Make No Sense': Elon Musk Responds to Ark Invest Analyst Who Defends Bill Gates
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk on Saturday responded to an assertion by Ark Investment Management analyst Brett Winton, who said it was "okay" for Bill Gates to short the EV Maker's stock.

headline: Google and Meta Facing New EU Regulations To Curb Illegal Content
summary:
European Union countries and EU lawmakers have agreed upon a stringent regulation to curtail illegal content on online platforms. 

The bloc agreed on the broad terms of the Digital Services Act, or DSA, which will force tech companies to take greater responsibility for content optimization on their platforms.

headline: How Elon Musk Managed to Convince Banks For Financing Proposed Twitter Deal?
summary: Elon Musk  disclosed in a filing on Thursday that he has received commitments for $46.5 million in debt financing to buy Twitter, Inc. (NYSE: TWTR).
